property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-25.0.2.10-hotspot\bin;C:\windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\windows\system32;C:\windows;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-25.0.2.10-hotspot\bin;c:\Users\morgan.graves\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\debugCommand;c:\Users\morgan.graves\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\copilotCli;C:\Users\morgan.graves\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code;C:\Program Files\Eclipse Adoptium\jdk-25.0.2.10-hotspot\bin;C:\windows\system32;C:\windows;C:\windows\System32\Wbem;C:\windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Users\morgan.graves\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\morgan.graves\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\morgan.graves\AppData\Local\Coursier\data\bin;C:\Users\morgan.graves\AppData\Local\Programs\Git\cmd;C:\Users\morgan.graves\AppData\Local\Coursier\cache\arc\https\github.com\adoptium\temurin11-binaries\releases\download\jdk-11.0.30%252B7\OpenJDK11U-jdk_x64_windows_hotspot_11.0.30_7.zip\jdk-11.0.30+7\bin;C:\Users\morgan.graves\AppData\Local\Python\binc:\Users\morgan.graves\.vscode\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.58.5\bundled\scripts\noConfigScripts;.

testcase.name: Ledger should exist and allow tests to run
Ledger should return an empty list of months when created with no transactions
Ledger should group transactions by year and month
Ledger should return a single Month when all transactions occur in the same month

failure.message: List(Transaction(2026-03-10, Category("Rent"), Money(-500)), Transaction(2026-03-10, Category("Salary"), Money(1000))) did not contain the same elements in the same (iterated) order as List(Transaction(2026-03-10, Category("Salary"), Money(1000)), Transaction(2026-03-10, Category("Rent"), Money(-500)))

testcase.failure: org.scalatest.exceptions.TestFailedException: List(Transaction(2026-03-10, Category("Rent"), Money(-500)), Transaction(2026-03-10, Category("Salary"), Money(1000))) did not contain the same elements in the same (iterated) order as List(Transaction(2026-03-10, Category("Salary"), Money(1000)), Transaction(2026-03-10, Category("Rent"), Money(-500))) at testcase.name: Ledger should return multiple Months when transactions span multiple months
Ledger should exclude months that have no transactions
Ledger should preserve all transactions when grouping into months
Ledger should return months ordered by year and month ascending
Ledger should produce deterministic results regardless of transaction order
